'''vakomo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:aventure|aventure]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| v-k-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:aventure|aventure]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| vakomo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:vækemeth|vækemeth]] || [[word:vækemej|vækemej]] || [[word:vækemesh|vækemesh]] || [[word:vækeme|vækeme]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:vakokomoth|vakokomoth]] || [[word:vakokomoj|vakokomoj]] || [[word:vakokomosh|vakokomosh]] || [[word:vakokomo|vakokomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:vakomoth|vakomoth]] || [[word:vakomoj|vakomoj]] || [[word:vakomosh|vakomosh]] || [[word:vakomo|vakomo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:vakofmofth|vakofmofth]] || [[word:vakofmofj|vakofmofj]] || [[word:vakofmofsh|vakofmofsh]] || [[word:vakofmof|vakofmof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:vakomotho|vakomotho]] || [[word:vakomojo|vakomojo]] || [[word:vakomosho|vakomosho]] || [[word:vakomoko|vakomoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:vakomoth|vakomoth]] || [[word:vakomoj|vakomoj]] || [[word:vakomosh|vakomosh]] || [[word:vakomo|vakomo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:vakomothol|vakomothol]] || [[word:vakomojol|vakomojol]] || [[word:vakomoshol|vakomoshol]] || [[word:vakomokol|vakomokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:vakomoothotho|vakomoothotho]] || [[word:vakomoojojo|vakomoojojo]] || [[word:vakomooshosho|vakomooshosho]] || [[word:vakomooko|vakomooko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:vakomothon|vakomothon]] || [[word:vakomojon|vakomojon]] || [[word:vakomoshon|vakomoshon]] || [[word:vakomokon|vakomokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:vakomothooro|vakomothooro]] || [[word:vakomojooro|vakomojooro]] || [[word:vakomoshooro|vakomoshooro]] || [[word:vakomokooro|vakomokooro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|ebaeb35}}
